name: mantle-agent-autopay
description: Recurring and milestone payments for AI agents on Mantle.

scripts.verify: forge build && forge test -vv && node mantle-agent-autopay.mjs help && node mantle-agent-autopay.mjs schedule --payer 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000001 --agent 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000002 --amount 1 --period-days 7 --payments 4
